series_metadata.series_description: Tax return and related documentation, including Jenkins Act records, pay-in reports, and correspondence, reporting cigarettes purchased for use, storage, or other consumption in this state upon which the excise tax had not been previously paid.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Destroy 3 yrs after the end of the calendar year or until time as the diligent enforcement inquiry is resolved for a particular year. ; Electronic: Destroy 3 yrs after the end of the calendar year or until time as the diligent enforcement inquiry is resolved for a particular year., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
